who: HR managers in small to medium-sized businesses using BambooHR with 50-200 employees
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized businesses using BambooHR processing 50-200 employee records, inefficient reporting causes delayed decision-making. We provide customized reports and dashboards instead of manual spreadsheets and basic reporting tools.
problem: Inefficient reporting and analytics on employee data
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar reporting issues
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video links
Participate in forums where HR managers share tools
try_it: Let users try Custom report generation and Dashboard creation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with clear CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV imports for existing data
